CVE-2021-29338.title: Integer Overflow in OpenJPEG v2.4.0 allows remote attackers to cr ...
CVE-2021-29338.description: Integer Overflow in OpenJPEG v2.4.0 allows remote attackers to crash the application, causing a Denial of Service (DoS). This occurs when the attacker uses the command line option "-ImgDir" on a directory that contains 1048576 files.
